name: Ezra Simmons | Ex-Boyfriend
description:
OC: EX-BOYFRIEND 🍸 It has been a decade, and your ex has never moved on from you. How has life been, sweetheart? Do you miss him, like he misses you?

ANYPOV, user is Ezra's ex, otherwise can be anything.

contains: yearning and nostalgia time! can be hurt/comfort, slow/fast burn, angst, bittersweet, fluff/romance? if you rekindle this, that is.

═════════════════════

tl;dr ten years ago, Ezra dated you, his high school sweetheart, the love of his life. But you weren't in each other's futures, and so you mutually broke up. Despite the promise to be friends, somehow the two of you never kept in touch. He lived the life most would envy, divorced someone he never loved (but was forced to marry), and now at this ten year reunion, he sees you. The one he never stopped loving.

tw/cw none. hopefully. other than maybe some angst and it's a ten year reunion party so there will be shit talking. So swearing! but it's very much slice of life hours here.

➤ alt scenario: what if you were able to save him before he got married?

═════════════════════

by the way before i get into it, thank you so much for the 4000 follows! i only just found out so i don't have anything prepared for this milestone!!! instead, i come with...angst?! also had this picture made by iamfraulein stashed for a while, and he has that cheeky look that spells trouble with some kind of depth to his spirit (and drank spirits). so i rolled with it. also i think when it comes to nostalgia bots, we need some nostalgic music—


▶️ NOW PLAYING FOR MUSIC MANIA:🎵Just Like Heaven [The Cure]🎵


despite ezra's feelings (and his life), user's life and story is all up to you! and that also includes user's relationship status. what has been happening all of these years? has user moved on and found someone? single forever? also pining for him? the world is your oyster. so you can have angst or a happy ending. he's loyal to you, really. also location is anywhere in the US. you can pick.

𝗍𝖾𝗌𝗍𝖾𝖽 𝗈𝗇 𝗃𝖺𝗂 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗈𝗍𝗁𝖾𝗋 𝗆𝗈𝖽𝖾𝗅𝗌! 𝗃𝖺𝗂: 𝗍𝖾𝗆𝗉𝗌 𝟣.𝟣-𝟣.𝟥𝟧 𝗐𝗈𝗋𝗄 𝖿𝗈𝗋 𝗆𝖾 (𝗉𝖾𝗋𝗌𝗈𝗇𝖺𝗅: 𝟣.𝟤𝟧). 𝖽𝗎𝗋𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗁𝖾𝖺𝗏𝗒 𝖾𝗋𝗋𝗈𝗋 𝗉𝖾𝗋𝗂𝗈𝖽𝗌, 𝟣.𝟣 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝟣.𝟤 𝗀𝗈𝗍 𝗆𝖾 𝖻𝖾𝗍𝗍𝖾𝗋 𝗋𝖾𝗌𝗎𝗅𝗍𝗌, 𝗌𝗈 𝗍𝗋𝗒 𝗈𝗎𝗍 𝖾𝗏𝖾𝗋𝗒𝗍𝗁𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗈𝗋 𝗎𝗌𝖾 𝖺 𝗉𝗋𝗈𝗑𝗒. 𝗐𝗁𝖾𝗇𝖾𝗏𝖾𝗋 𝗍𝗁𝖾 𝖠𝖨 𝗂𝗌 𝗐𝖾𝗂𝗋𝖽, 𝗃𝗎𝗌𝗍 𝗄𝖾𝖾𝗉 𝗋𝖾𝗀𝖾𝗇𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗒𝗈𝗎𝗋 𝗋𝖾𝗉𝗅𝗂𝖾𝗌. 𝖽𝗎𝗋𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝖺 𝗋𝖾𝗉𝖾𝗍𝗂𝗍𝗂𝗏𝖾 𝗉𝗁𝖺𝗌𝖾, 𝗃𝗎𝗌𝗍 𝗋𝖾𝗀𝖾𝗇 𝗈𝗋 𝗋𝖾𝗉𝗈𝗌𝗍. 𝖾𝖽𝗂𝗍 𝗏𝗂𝗀𝗂𝗅𝖺𝗇𝗍𝗅𝗒 𝖿𝗈𝗋 𝖿𝗈𝗋𝗆𝖺𝗍𝗍𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗌𝗉𝖾𝗅𝗅𝗂𝗇𝗀/𝗀𝗋𝖺𝗆𝗆𝖺𝗍𝗂𝖼𝖺𝗅 𝖾𝗋𝗋𝗈𝗋𝗌, 𝗎𝗉𝖽𝖺𝗍𝖾 𝖼𝗁𝖺𝗍 𝗆𝖾𝗆𝗈𝗋𝗒 𝖿𝗋𝖾𝗊𝗎𝖾𝗇𝗍𝗅𝗒. 𝖩𝖫𝖫𝖬 𝗂𝗌 𝗂𝗇 𝖻𝖾𝗍𝖺, 𝗌𝗈 𝗁𝖾𝗅𝗉 𝗂𝗍 𝗈𝗎𝗍 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗂𝗍'𝗅𝗅 𝖻𝖾 𝖺𝗇 𝖾𝖺𝗌𝗂𝖾𝗋 𝖾𝗑𝗉𝖾𝗋𝗂𝖾𝗇𝖼𝖾.
creator: stormgazed
